databases.title: Lung Development
databases.tagline: Lung development from early fetal to mature adult
databases.mission: Stage-resolved single-cell resource for fetal-to-adult lung development.

databases.title: Lung Infection
databases.tagline: Single-cell database of lung infectious diseases
databases.mission: Disease-focused resource for host response across pathogen types.

databases.title: Lung Cancer Atlas
databases.tagline: Single-cell atlas of lung cancer ecosystems
databases.mission: Atlas-centered resource for malignant states and microenvironment remodeling.

databases.title: Lung Evolution
databases.tagline: Evolution from fish to amphibians to reptiles to human
databases.mission: Comparative resource for conserved/divergent respiratory cell programs.
